LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED. THE CURRENT PLEADING DOES NOT ADEQUATELY STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE AGAINST THE INSURANCE COMMISSIONER. THIS IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE PLAINTIFF SEEKING TO ASSERT A NEW AND DIFFERENT CLAIM AGAINST THE INSURANCE COMMISSIONER IF THE TRIAL IS CONTINUED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

Mtn To Reset Trial Date
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Text Ruling

Defendant'S Motion For Summary Adjudiction, Or In The Alternative, Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TERENCE J. COLEMAN, TEL. NO. 433-8000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES J. MOAK OF THE MESEVE, MUMPER & HUGHES LLP, TEL. NO. (213)620-0300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STANDARD LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Standard Insurance Company's Motion For Summary Adjudication, Or In The Alternative, Summary Judgment IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE REMAINS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WITH RESPECT TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION AND TO THE EXTENT THAT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS SOUGHT ON THIS ENFORCEMENT ISSUE AND IS NOT APPROPRIATE SUBJECT FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to
CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)

Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Adjudiction Of Issues
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TERENCE J. COLEMAN, TEL. NO. 433-8000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES J. MOAK OF THE MESEVE, MUMPER & HUGHES LLP, TEL. NO. (213)620-0300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STANDARD LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; Plaintiff Roya Ferdowsnia's Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues against Defendant Standard Insurance Company IS DENIED WITHOUT REACHING ON THE MERITS, ISSUE IS NOT SUBJECT TO SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Defts To Motion Tod Ismiss; Request
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TERRENCE J. COLEMAN, TEL. NO. 433-8000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KAREN W. YIU, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5385 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT INSURANCE COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA;
ATTY. MARIA ELLINIKOS OF THE AKIN GUMP LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 765-9500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; JOINDER OF DEFENDANT STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY In Defendant STEVE POIZNER AS COMMISSIONER OF INSURANCE Motion To Dismiss IS GRANTED. THE CURRENT PLEADING DOES NOT ADEQUATELY STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE AGAINST THE INSURANCE COMMISSIONER. THIS IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE PLAINTIFF SEEKING TO ASSERT A NEW AND DIFFERENT CLAIM AGAINST THE INSURANCE COMMISSIONER IF THE TRIAL IS CONTINUED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)=(301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Set For Trial On Mar-21-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-07-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maria Ellinikos, Esq. of Akin, Gump, Strauss Hauer & Feld, LLP, 415-765-9500 for defendant and moving party Standard Life Insurance Company
Katie Spielman, Esq. of Pillsbury Levinson, 415-433-8000 for plaintiff and opposing party Roya Ferdowsnia

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT STANDARD LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. ASSUMING WITHOUT DECIDING THAT THE MANDAMUS CAUSE OF ACTION IS VIABLE, ISSUES CONCERNING CONTRACT INTERPRETATION AND VALIDITY ARE SUFFICIENTLY SIMILAR TO JUSTFY JOINDER. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
